body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-2614", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.0/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.0/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}], "description": "A vulnerability in the `_create_model_version()` handler of `mlflow/server/handlers.py` in mlflow/mlflow versions 3.9.0 and earlier allows an unauthenticated remote attacker to read arbitrary files from the server's filesystem. The issue arises when a `CreateModelVersion` request includes the tag `mlflow.prompt.is_prompt`, which bypasses source path validation. This enables an attacker to store an arbitrary local filesystem path as the model version source. The `get_model_version_artifact_handler()` function later uses this source to serve files without verifying the model version's prompt status, leading to a complete confidentiality compromise. This issue is fixed in version 3.10.0.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00712, "percentile": 0.49273}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-42h5-h8qh-vv9v", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-18T16:49:38Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-42h5-h8qh-vv9v", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-42h5-h8qh-vv9v"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-2614"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-11T20:25:41Z", "published_at": "2026-05-11T21:31:35Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-2614", "https://github.com/mlflow/mlflow/commit/6e801f4259d96804c73107315b24cef0f6aa115a", "https://huntr.com/bounties/19380271-3fbf-4beb-987e-6fd7069c55e6", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-42h5-h8qh-vv9v"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/mlflow/mlflow", "summary": "MLflow allows an unauthenticated remote attacker to read arbitrary files from the server's filesystem", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-18T16:49:39Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-42h5-h8qh-vv9v", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.10.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "mlflow"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 3.10.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: MLflow allows an unauthenticated remote attacker to read arbitrary files from the server's filesystem
